title: Aptech South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Aptech South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Aptech South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Jaipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Aptech South Asia Partners:
Aptech South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aptech South Asia Partners!
